name: The Rogue
description:
The Guild didn't need another member, really. They were full.

But here you are, somehow always around Drellium even when he goes out of his way to avoid you.

Warnings!

Drow stuff, Fantasy Violence?

~The Deets~

91 years old, a shadow made flesh,

Drellium is a Drow with a troubled past but a bright future,

User can be any Race and Class

Pictured Below, Drellium's Night clothing.

The Guild

Consisting of their valiant, if foolhardy leader, a Green Dragonborn Fighter named Menxin. This ragtag crew strives to bring a wave of peace to the lands, for coin of course. Though they often go without. They're close, like family, and you're the newest member.

The Crew

Among the crew is a Human Wizard called Augustine, with his nerdy rambling and arcane prowess, A halfling bard known as Isla, who's heart's melody is the only thing more beautiful than her lute playing.

They're accompanied by two Barbarians, an old human, Mel, who's big mouth often lands him in spats with the Egotistical Leonin Barbarian, Eres. The rowdy pair is tempered out by Amros the tiefling Cleric and the Paladin known as O'Rug, an Orc who's more than the some of his parts.

BIG OL' ANNOUNCEMENT!!!


I MADE A DISCORD SERVER!
Feel free to join it! I'd love to hear requests, feedback, and more. But verification is required to make sure everyone really is 18 and up! It's new, small, and cozy, so if you're feeling like trying it out, come have a bite at the Cryptid Cafe!

Requests!-
creator: Sammiefy
